title: Garage Door Repair
shortDescription: Fixing doors that will not open or close. Loud doors. Off track doors. Broken rollers. Damaged panels.
description: When your garage door stops working properly, it can disrupt your entire day. We diagnose and fix all types of garage door problems with same-day service available across Middle Tennessee.
features: Same-day repair service for most issues
Full inspection included with every repair
We carry replacement parts on our truck
imageAlt: Professional garage door repair service in Middle Tennessee
cta: Learn More about Garage Door Repair

title: Spring Replacement
shortDescription: Torsion and extension spring replacement for broken or worn garage door springs.
description: Broken garage door springs are one of the most common reasons doors stop working. If your door won't open, feels unusually heavy, or you heard a loud bang, you likely have a broken spring.
features: Most jobs completed in under an hour
imageAlt: Same day garage door spring replacement service

title: Garage Door Installation
shortDescription: New garage doors installed for homes in Middle Tennessee. Professional setup and removal of old doors.
description: Whether you're building a new home or upgrading an old garage door, we provide professional installation services throughout Middle Tennessee. We'll help you choose the right door based on style, insulation needs, and budget.
features: Free removal and disposal of old doors
imageAlt: New garage door installation for homes in Middle Tennessee
cta: Learn More about Garage Door Installation

title: Opener Repair and Installation
shortDescription: Fixing non responsive garage door openers. Installing new LiftMaster and Chamberlain style openers.
description: A malfunctioning garage door opener can leave you stuck outside or inside your garage. We repair and install all major brands including LiftMaster, Chamberlain, Genie, and Craftsman.
features: WiFi and smartphone enabled openers available
Battery backup options for power outages
imageAlt: Garage door opener repair and installation with WiFi features

title: Garage Door Maintenance
shortDescription: Tune ups. Lubrication. Safety checks. Balance adjustments.
description: Regular maintenance keeps your garage door running smoothly and prevents costly repairs down the road. Most garage doors should be serviced once a year to stay in good condition.
features: Catches small problems before they grow
imageAlt: Regular garage door maintenance and tune-up service
cta: Learn More about Garage Door Maintenance

title: 24 Hour Emergency Service
shortDescription: Fast emergency garage door repair in Estill Springs, Tullahoma, Murfreesboro and surrounding areas.
description: Garage door emergencies don't wait for business hours. We offer 24-hour emergency service for urgent problems across Middle Tennessee, responding quickly and coming prepared to fix the issue on the spot.
imageAlt: 24 hour emergency garage door repair service in Middle Tennessee
